base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of item_heart_small — a pickup_item (health_pickup) from 1986 legend of zelda. Small Heart — 2-frame pulse. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Small Heart — 2-frame pulse; drops from enemies; restores 1 HP
